60 = Mass Immunization Center. A location where providers administer pneumococcal pneumonia 
and influenza virus vaccinations and submit these services as electronic media claims, paper 
claims, or using the roster billing method. This generally takes place in a mass immunization 
setting, such as, a public health center, pharmacy, or mall but may include a physician office 
setting.
